body.title: Inference Proxy: expose source kind (local vs paid-cloud) on InferenceResponse
body.intention: I intend that a caller can reconstruct local-vs-paid-cloud from an InferenceResponse, so igor's reason() seam can preserve used_api.
body.description:
**Problem:** Repointing igor's gateway.reason() onto Proxy dispatch() (T-inf-reroute-A) must preserve its 3rd return value used_api (local vs paid cloud). Callers BRANCH on it: main.py:6304 emits PROC_ROUTING_LOCAL vs PROC_ROUTING_ESCALATE, main.py:6297 pfc.measure_friction(used_api=...), main.py:5974 'if used_api:'. Today the only signal on InferenceResponse is source_billing_type (shim.py:74), which DEFAULTS to 'usage_based' (device.py:487 getattr(source,'billing_type','usage_based')) even on failure/no-source — so it can't reliably distinguish local Ollama from paid cloud. Without a clean signal the frozen-signature seam has a hole.
**Proposed shape:** Add an explicit, non-defaulting field to InferenceResponse identifying the source kind (e.g. source_kind: 'local'|'cloud'|'none', or source_name + is_local bool) set from the actually-resolved source in dispatch() (device.py ~L456/487). Local Ollama -> local; OpenRouter/Anthropic -> cloud; failure chokepoint (device.py L412-438) -> none. Keep source_billing_type as-is.
**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/shim.py (InferenceResponse), unseen_university/devices/inference/device.py (dispatch sets it).
**Design rules:** device.py/shim.py design center; log the interface crossing.
**Scope boundary:** IN — add + populate the source-kind field; a unit test asserting local source -> local, cloud source -> cloud, no-source -> none. OUT — changing routing; igor's consumption (that's T-inf-reroute-A).
**Test plan:** unit test: dispatch with a stubbed local source -> response.source_kind=='local'; stubbed cloud source -> 'cloud'; forced no-source -> 'none'. RED before field exists.
**Completion criteria:** InferenceResponse carries a reliable local-vs-cloud signal; test green.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: InferenceResponse.source_kind (local|cloud|none) added; is_local ClassVar on Source (True only on OllamaSource); dispatch() sets it on success + 'none' at no-source chokepoint. 4 tests green (incl. flat_rate-cloud->cloud, proving source_kind != billing_type). Proof: red=AssertionError green=passed @ f670866b. Unblocks T-inf-reroute-A.
